practices.title: Restrict management access to trusted IPs
practices.detail: Never allow HTTPS/SSH/Telnet management access from 'all' source IPs. Restrict to specific admin subnets.
practices.cli_example:
config system interface
  edit <mgmt-interface>
    set allowaccess https ssh
  next
end

practices.title: Change default admin credentials
practices.detail: The default 'admin' account with blank password must be changed before production deployment.

practices.title: Enable logging on all allow policies
practices.detail: All policies with action 'accept' should have logtraffic set to 'all' or 'utm'. Without logging, traffic is invisible for security monitoring.
practices.cli_example:
config firewall policy
  edit <id>
    set logtraffic all
  next
end

practices.title: Use IKEv2 for new VPN tunnels
practices.detail: IKEv2 provides better security and performance than IKEv1. Use for all new IPSec tunnel configurations.

practices.title: Use AES-256 encryption with SHA-256 or higher
practices.detail: AES-256 and SHA-256+ are required for HIPAA and PCI-DSS compliance. Avoid 3DES, DES, MD5, and SHA1.

practices.title: Use DH group 14 or higher
practices.detail: DH groups 1, 2, and 5 are considered weak. Use group 14 (2048-bit) minimum, prefer group 19 or 20 (ECDH).
